scripts.validate:docs: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['README.md','AGENTS.md','docs/AGENT_ORCHESTRATION.md','docs/MODEL_ROUTING.md','docs/CONTEXT_PACKETS.md','docs/USAGE_ACCOUNTING.md','docs/HYGIENE.md','docs/OBSERVABILITY.md','docs/VISUAL_STYLE_GUIDE.md'].forEach(p=>{if(!fs.existsSync(p)) throw new Error('Missing '+p)}); console.log('docs present')"
scripts.validate:visual-system: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['framework/src/visual-system/tokens.ts','assets/examples/new-regime-governance-map.svg','assets/examples/old-regime-satire-panel.svg','assets/examples/graphic-brief-template.md'].forEach(p=>{if(!fs.existsSync(p)) throw new Error('Missing '+p)}); console.log('visual system assets present')"
